to determine the optimal strategy for guessing the other llms number we need to consider the concept of zerosum games in such games if one player wins all possible outcomes it means that the second player can never be sure how to play to maximize their own winnings

heres why

1 zerosum game in any zerosum game the total sum of all possible outcomes is always zero this is because each player must either lose or gain an equal amount from every outcome they face
2 strategic play to minimize your losses you should aim to make the best choices in each round knowing that the opponent will try to exploit these choices by choosing numbers strategically you can ensure that the opponent faces situations where they have no clear advantage over you

given this understanding heres how you might proceed

 strategy pick the smallest number between 1 and 100000 this is because picking smaller numbers gives you more opportunities to avoid losing on the first round by choosing the largest number conversely larger numbers give you more chances to lose if you dont pick the right number in the first round

example
 lets say the other llm chooses the number 50000
 you should then choose the next lowest number which would be 49999
 continue this process until you find the correct number

the optimal strategy involves ensuring that you are playing as efficiently as possible within the constraints provided ie youre not trying to outsmart the other llm
